# Drum Circle

- Saturday, February 7, 2026
- 8:00 PM11:00 PM20:0023:00

- Lake Claire Community Land Trust270 Arizona Avenue NortheastAtlanta, GA, 30307United States [(map)](http://maps.google.com/?q=270%20Arizona%20Avenue%20Northeast%20Atlanta,%20GA,%2030307%20United%20States)

- [Google Calendar](http://www.google.com/calendar/event?action=TEMPLATE&text=Drum%20Circle%20&dates=20260208T010000Z/20260208T040000Z&location=270%20Arizona%20Avenue%20Northeast%2C%20Atlanta%2C%20GA%2C%2030307%2C%20United%20States) [ICS](https://www.lcclt.org/new-events/7sljklmp5l9fba2?format=ical)

Join us on each month for Atlanta’s longest-running drum circle, a community tradition since 1991!

Gather around the fire in the amphitheater for an evening of rhythm, connection, and community.

Event Details:

• Time: 8:00–11:00pm

• Getting Here: Walk, bike, carpool, or take MARTA (half a mile from Edgewood-Candler Park Station). Limited parking available at 369 Connecticut Ave.

• Suggested Donation: $5

Important Notes:

• No alcohol, drugs, or flash photography.

• Respect our neighbors—drive slowly and keep voices low when leaving.

0 Likes

Share

Earlier Event: February 1

[Fruit Tree Pruning Basics Workshop](https://www.lcclt.org/new-events/2025/1/18/fruit-tree-pruning-basics-workshop-54wsa)
